use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, modals, and application interfaces
Destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations with visual warning
Navigation and navigation-adjacent buttons with outline styling
Compact icon-only buttons for toolbars and action clusters
Loading state indicators during async operations
ai_summary: A versatile React button component built with Radix UI Slot and styled using class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (sm, default, lg, xl, icon-only), with optional loading states, left/right icon slots, and asChild composition. Includes proper accessibility with focus-visible rings, disabled states, and keyboard navigation support.
